top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(away_team_goal) AS avg_goals
FROM Match m
JOIN Team t ON m.away_team_api_id = t.team_api_id
JOIN Country c ON m.country_id = c.id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'Parma' AND c.name = 'Italy';

SELECT AVG(away_team_goal) 
FROM Match m
JOIN Team t ON m.away_team_api_id = t.team_api_id
JOIN Country c ON m.country_id = c.id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'Parma' 
  AND c.name = 'Italy';

final.sql:
SELECT AVG(away_team_goal) AS avg_goals
FROM Match m
JOIN Team t ON m.away_team_api_id = t.team_api_id
JOIN Country c ON m.country_id = c.id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'Parma' AND c.name = 'Italy';
